subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from the Wronged One unto a leaf among the leaves and a handmaiden among the maidservants, that she may rejoice in the verses of her Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی المظلوم الی ورقه من الاوراق و واحده من الاماء لتفرج بایات ربها
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for women, @knowledge; recognition of God
